summary: A clip from a television news interview shown in tight close-up of a man in a dark suit and patterned tie speaking to camera in front of a dark interior. Burned-in lower-third text reads INTO THE FRAY and TAKES HELM OF EMBATTLED AGENCY, then changes to DEPORTATION GOALS and TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT, with a red BREAKING TONIGHT banner along the bottom.

script.scene: Close shot of a man in a suit speaking, captioned INTO THE FRAY.
The same man continues, captioned DEPORTATION GOALS and TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT.

notable_text: INTO THE FRAY; TAKES HELM OF EMBATTLED AGENCY; DEPORTATION GOALS; TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT; BREAKING TONIGHT
